data.title: test-intent-search-agent: test_budget_cap_advisory uses prose word assertion violating behavioral-testing-standard Rule 5
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: test_budget_cap_advisory asserts that the word 'advisory' appears in intent-search.md body text. Per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5, grep-based content assertions on instruction file body text are prohibited — they test wording rather than structural contract boundaries.
File: tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh
Category: verification
